'''âk-m-d-r''' ('''kmdr''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:worship, ritual|worship, ritual]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:worship, ritual|worship, ritual]]
|-
! Citation form
| âk-m-d-r
|-
! Lemma
| kmdr
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikamderoko|thikamderoko]] || [[word:jikamderoko|jikamderoko]] || [[word:shikamderoko|shikamderoko]] || [[word:kikamderoko|kikamderoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukamderoko|thuthukamderoko]] || [[word:jujukamderoko|jujukamderoko]] || [[word:shushukamderoko|shushukamderoko]] || [[word:kukukamderoko|kukukamderoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukamderoko|thukamderoko]] || [[word:jukamderoko|jukamderoko]] || [[word:shukamderoko|shukamderoko]] || [[word:kukamderoko|kukamderoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukamderoko|thukamderoko]] || [[word:jukamderoko|jukamderoko]] || [[word:shukamderoko|shukamderoko]] || [[word:kukamderoko|kukamderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekamderoko|thekamderoko]] || [[word:jekamderoko|jekamderoko]] || [[word:shekamderoko|shekamderoko]] || [[word:kekamderoko|kekamderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokamderoko|thothokamderoko]] || [[word:jojokamderoko|jojokamderoko]] || [[word:shoshokamderoko|shoshokamderoko]] || [[word:kokokamderoko|kokokamderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokamderoko|thokamderoko]] || [[word:jokamderoko|jokamderoko]] || [[word:shokamderoko|shokamderoko]] || [[word:kokamderoko|kokamderoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokamderoko|thokamderoko]] || [[word:jokamderoko|jokamderoko]] || [[word:shokamderoko|shokamderoko]] || [[word:kokamderoko|kokamderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkamderoko|thĂŠkamderoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkamderoko|jĂŠkamderoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkamderoko|shĂŠkamderoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkamderoko|kĂŠkamderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakamderoko|thathakamderoko]] || [[word:jajakamderoko|jajakamderoko]] || [[word:shashakamderoko|shashakamderoko]] || [[word:kakakamderoko|kakakamderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakamderoko|thakamderoko]] || [[word:jakamderoko|jakamderoko]] || [[word:shakamderoko|shakamderoko]] || [[word:kakamderoko|kakamderoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakamderoko|thakamderoko]] || [[word:jakamderoko|jakamderoko]] || [[word:shakamderoko|shakamderoko]] || [[word:kakamderoko|kakamderoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakamderithi|shakamderithi]] || [[word:shakamderiji|shakamderiji]] || [[word:shakamderishi|shakamderishi]] || [[word:shakamderiki|shakamderiki]]

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]] || [[word:shakamderĂŻf|shakamderĂŻf]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
